name: Wood Wall Cabinet Gray - Threshold™
description:
Expand your bathroom storage with this Wood Wall Storage Cabinet from Threshold™. This wall storage shelf maximizes storage space in your bathroom. It showcases a gray wooden finish that coordinates easily with any decor. The two open shelves and a single door cabinet provide enough space to store and display your bath items and essentials. Pair with other pieces in the same collection to complete the cohesive look.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
